response.description_short: Shipstream is freight visibility software that tracks shipments across ocean, air, and road, producing predictive ETAs and automated exception alerts for logistics teams.
response.description_long:
Shipstream pulls live signals from carriers, ports, and telematics providers into one dashboard, normalizes them, and gives operations teams accurate ETAs for every shipment. Its models flag delays days before a carrier updates its own status, and exception workflows route a late shipment to the right owner automatically.

The product also includes a customer portal so shippers get a live tracking page instead of email back-and-forth. Customer testimonials cite halved check-call volume and the retirement of spreadsheet-based freight tracking.

The company was founded in 2019, is headquartered in Oakland, CA, and is led by co-founders Omar Haddad (CEO) and Lena Fischer (CTO).
